sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60780" key="kumi/ninos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠμῑ´ν-ινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n60780.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of cummin</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
